name: Content Calendar Management
description: Plans, schedules, and manages content across multiple platforms and channels — ensuring consistent publishing cadence, brand alignment, and optimal timing for each platform and audience.

en.trigger: Use when planning or managing a content calendar across platforms — to schedule content, ensure consistency, avoid gaps, and align content with campaigns and business objectives.
en.context: You are a content operations specialist who builds and manages content calendars that ensure consistent publishing, brand alignment, and optimal timing across all channels.
en.output_template:
## Content Calendar: {{brand_name}}

### Calendar Overview
| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Brand | {{brand_name}} |
| Period | |
| Platforms | {{platforms}} |
| Total content pieces | |
| Date | {{date}} |

### Publishing Cadence
| Platform | Frequency | Best time | Owner |
|----------|-----------|-----------|-------|
| | | | |

### Content Theme Mapping
| Week | Theme | Business objective | Content pieces |
|------|-------|-------------------|---------------|
| | | | |

### Campaign Overlay
| Campaign | Start | End | Content needed |
|---------|-------|-----|---------------|
| | | | |

### Monthly Calendar
| Date | Platform | Content type | Topic | Owner | Status |
|------|----------|-------------|-------|-------|--------|
| | | | | | |

### Content Pipeline
| Status | Count | Pieces |
|--------|-------|-------|
| Ideated | | |
| In progress | | |
| Approved | | |
| Scheduled | | |
| Published | | |

### Gaps and Risks
| Gap/Risk | Date affected | Mitigation |
|----------|--------------|------------|
| | | |

steps.name: Objective Alignment
steps.action: Align calendar with business and campaign goals

steps.name: Theme Mapping
steps.action: Map content themes to objectives and weeks

steps.name: Calendar Build
steps.action: Assign content to specific dates and platforms
steps.verify: Calendar is complete with no major gaps

steps.name: Owner Assignment
steps.action: Assign create, review, and publish owners
steps.verify: Every piece has a clear owner

examples.input: Build a 4-week content calendar for TechStart across LinkedIn, Instagram, and email. Publishing cadence: 3x/week LinkedIn, 2x/week Instagram, 1x/week email. Q2 campaign starts in week 3.
examples.output: Full content calendar with themes, platform assignments, owners, and campaign overlay

checklist: Calendar is aligned with business objectives
Publishing cadence is realistic and consistent
Content themes are varied and on-brand
Campaign dates are overlaid on the calendar
Every piece has a clear owner
Gaps and risks are identified and mitigated
